description: Baseline metrics for the offline grounded-recall bench. Regenerate with: python -m bench.grounded_recall --save-results --json. The pytest at tests/test_bench_grounded_recall.py gates against these numbers. recall@K denominator is positive cases only (excludes adversarial negatives, which are tracked via adversarial_no_match_rate). match_rate is over all cases. adversarial_no_match_rate honours each case's expected.allow_weak floor; adversarial_clean_rate is the strict zero-citations variant; adversarial_mean_citations is the mean number of weak citations leaked on trick queries (lower is better).
